prompt: We discovered a database breach exposing 50,000 Brazilian customers names, emails, and encrypted passwords. What are our LGPD notification obligations and what should we do in the next 72 hours?
assertions: Cites Art. 48 LGPD as the breach notification obligation
Specifies 3 working days for preliminary ANPD notification (ANPD Resolution No. 15/2024), distinguishing from GDPR 72-hour rule
Mentions 20 working days for full incident report to ANPD
Covers required notification content: nature of data, number of subjects affected, measures taken
Addresses whether data subjects must be notified and recommends password reset as immediate action
